name: EasyPay Uganda Mobile Money API
description: EasyPay Mobile Money API for Uganda. Supports collecting payments from and sending money to mobile money accounts (MTN, Airtel, Africell, UTL). All operations use a single POST endpoint with an 'action' field discriminator. Requires SSL/HTTPS. New accounts are limited to $10 USD/month for testing. 3% charge on deposits, variable payout fees.
